item.title: Pastor's Secret Affair Turned FATAL
item.description:
In the court hearing “To Tabatha, I’m so sorry. I never meant to hurt you, and I pray that all of you guys will forgive me,” Daniels said. “I’m godly sorry, and I know it doesn’t take back what has happened, nor does it negate what has happened, but I want you to know that I am so sorry for the pain that I’ve caused you.”
What are your thoughts about this case? - Em x

media:content.media:title: Pastor's Secret Affair Turned FATAL
media:content.media:description:
In the court hearing “To Tabatha, I’m so sorry. I never meant to hurt you, and I pray that all of you guys will forgive me,” Daniels said. “I’m godly sorry, and I know it doesn’t take back what has happened, nor does it negate what has happened, but I want you to know that I am so sorry for the pain that I’ve caused you.”
What are your thoughts about this case? - Em x

item.title: Footage Showed the Chilling Last Moments of Sonya Massey
item.description: The Sonya Massey is a controversial topic where some people claim that she posed no immediate threat to the officers while the others say officers did what they had to do to defend themselves. What are your thoughts?

media:content.media:title: Footage Showed the Chilling Last Moments of Sonya Massey
media:content.media:description: The Sonya Massey is a controversial topic where some people claim that she posed no immediate threat to the officers while the others say officers did what they had to do to defend themselves. What are your thoughts?

item.title: She Drowned Her Daughters. Now She Keeps Leaving Prison
item.description: What are your thoughts on this tragic situation? What other similar cases have you heard of that haunt you to this day?

media:content.media:title: She Drowned Her Daughters. Now She Keeps Leaving Prison
media:content.media:description: What are your thoughts on this tragic situation? What other similar cases have you heard of that haunt you to this day?

item.title: Zachary Holly Was The Last Person Who Should've Been Babysitting.
item.description: Six-year-old Jersey Bridgeman disappeared from her home in Bentonville, Arkansas, in 2014, setting off an urgent search that ended in tragedy. As investigators followed the evidence, attention turned to someone the family knew well—a trusted neighbor who had helped care for Jersey in the past. This video examines the investigation, the forensic evidence presented in court, and the legal proceedings that followed Zachary Holly's conviction. What warning signs, if any, could have been recognized before it was too late?

media:content.media:title: Zachary Holly Was The Last Person Who Should've Been Babysitting.
media:content.media:description: Six-year-old Jersey Bridgeman disappeared from her home in Bentonville, Arkansas, in 2014, setting off an urgent search that ended in tragedy. As investigators followed the evidence, attention turned to someone the family knew well—a trusted neighbor who had helped care for Jersey in the past. This video examines the investigation, the forensic evidence presented in court, and the legal proceedings that followed Zachary Holly's conviction. What warning signs, if any, could have been recognized before it was too late?

item.title: She Wrote a Book About Grief... After Poisoning Her Husband
item.description: After her husband suddenly died, Kouri Richins appeared to be a grieving widow trying to help her three young sons cope with loss by writing a children's book about grief. But investigators uncovered evidence that led to a very different story. Prosecutors argued she had carefully planned her husband's death using fentanyl, motivated by millions of dollars in life insurance and inheritance. In this video, we examine the evidence, the trial, and the sentence that shocked the nation. Was the children's book an act of love, or part of a carefully crafted illusion?

media:content.media:title: She Wrote a Book About Grief... After Poisoning Her Husband
media:content.media:description: After her husband suddenly died, Kouri Richins appeared to be a grieving widow trying to help her three young sons cope with loss by writing a children's book about grief. But investigators uncovered evidence that led to a very different story. Prosecutors argued she had carefully planned her husband's death using fentanyl, motivated by millions of dollars in life insurance and inheritance. In this video, we examine the evidence, the trial, and the sentence that shocked the nation. Was the children's book an act of love, or part of a carefully crafted illusion?

item.title: She Walked Into The Wrong Bar... And Met The Wrong Man | Jackie Vandagriff
item.description: Jackie Vandagriff was a 24-year-old college student looking for a job when a chance encounter led to a horrifying crime. Investigators later explored whether she had been selected simply because she resembled the suspect's former girlfriend, whose rejection had triggered an escalating pattern of stalking and obsession. Through surveillance footage, witness accounts, and the evidence presented in court, this case reveals how a stranger's life was forever changed in a matter of hours. Do you believe Jackie was deliberately targeted, or was she simply in the wrong place at the wrong time?

media:content.media:title: She Walked Into The Wrong Bar... And Met The Wrong Man | Jackie Vandagriff
media:content.media:description: Jackie Vandagriff was a 24-year-old college student looking for a job when a chance encounter led to a horrifying crime. Investigators later explored whether she had been selected simply because she resembled the suspect's former girlfriend, whose rejection had triggered an escalating pattern of stalking and obsession. Through surveillance footage, witness accounts, and the evidence presented in court, this case reveals how a stranger's life was forever changed in a matter of hours. Do you believe Jackie was deliberately targeted, or was she simply in the wrong place at the wrong time?
